meta.title: NODES — Your Second Brain, Visualized
meta.description: Delegate knowledge, track habits, visualize your neural network. Build a second brain that keeps you accountable.

hero.title: Delegate Knowledge.
hero.subtitle: Track habits, visualize connections, and build stability across every area of your life — with a system that remembers for you.
hero.graphToast: This is your node. Sign up to create your own.

howItWorks.title: Three Steps to Your Neural Network

steps.title: Create Cores
steps.description: Define gravity centers — the key areas of your life: Health, Career, Creativity, Relationships.

steps.title: Add Nodes
steps.description: Create action units within each core. Morning run, daily reading, meditation — every habit becomes a node.

steps.title: Track with Impulses
steps.description: Mark completions and watch stability grow. The system tracks your consistency so you don't have to.

philosophy.quote: Delegating knowledge frees your mind. When your habits live outside your head, you gain the clarity to focus on what matters.
philosophy.description: Your brain is for having ideas, not holding them. NODES externalizes your commitments into a living, visual system that never forgets.

features.title: Everything You Need to Build Stability

items.title: Graph Visualization
items.description: See your entire life as an interconnected network. Cores, nodes, and connectors form a neural map unique to you.

items.title: Stability Engine
items.description: Each node tracks its own stability score based on consistency. Watch habits crystallize from initiation to rock-solid.

items.title: Cores & Connectors
items.description: Organize nodes around gravity centers. Connectors link related habits so your network grows organically.

items.title: Impulse Tracking
items.description: One-tap habit completion. Binary, quantity, or duration — every type of habit finds its home.

items.title: Analytics & Heatmap
items.description: Historical stability charts, activity heatmaps, and per-node statistics reveal patterns invisible to the naked eye.

items.title: Cross-Platform
items.description: Web today, mobile tomorrow. Your neural network travels with you, always in sync.

pricing.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: Everything you need to start building your second brain.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For those who want deeper insights and integrations.

cta.title: Start Building Your Neural Network
cta.subtitle: Join people who delegate knowledge and build lasting habits.
cta.note: No credit card required. Start in 30 seconds.

graphSection.title: See Your Life as a Network
graphSection.subtitle: Every habit, goal, and connection visualized as a living neural map.

features.title: Visual Stability
features.description: Watch how consistent habits glow brighter and unstable ones fade — your network tells the truth.

features.title: Organic Growth
features.description: Add nodes and cores as your life evolves. The graph adapts and grows with you.

features.title: Interconnected Insights
features.description: See how habits influence each other through connectors. Discover patterns you never noticed.
